programme.title: Bill Dance Outdoors
programme.sub-title: Catching Crappie with a Professional P2
programme.desc: The excitement continues in part 2 with Bill and Randy catching more monster crappie on Bull Shoals.

programme.title: Fishing with Roland Martin
programme.desc: Roland skips Salt E Sink Worms under shady docks for largemouth bass with a musky bonus.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors
programme.desc: Jimmy is Fishing in Oklahoma catching crappie and bass.

programme.title: Ultimate Catch
programme.desc: Captain Eric and son Joey fish the Space Coast of Florida looking for that perfect Redfish!

programme.title: Jokers Wild Off the Hook
programme.desc: Sparky takes friends fishing with Reel Time for Steelhead in the winter waters of the Clearwater.

programme.title: Larry Smith Outdoors
programme.desc: Follow along as Larry and his clients get an early start on the Wolf River walleye bite!

programme.title: Jon Thelen's Destination Fish
programme.desc: Across two segments, Jon pursues earlysummer monsters - trophy-class fish that test tackle and tactics alike. From dialing in weather patterns to adapting presentations as the day evolves, Jon breaks down the mindset and mechanics behind consistently finding and landing giants on northern waters.

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater
programme.desc: It's a light tackle extravaganza for bonefish and white marlin!

programme.sub-title: Catching Crappie with a Professional P2

programme.title: Jon Thelen's Destination Fish
programme.desc: Across two segments, Jon pursues earlysummer monsters - trophy-class fish that test tackle and tactics alike. From dialing in weather patterns to adapting presentations as the day evolves, Jon breaks down the mindset and mechanics behind consistently finding and landing giants on northern waters.

programme.title: Bill Dance Saltwater
programme.desc: It's a light tackle extravaganza for bonefish and white marlin!

programme.title: Bill Dance Outdoors
programme.sub-title: Catching Crappie with a Professional P2
programme.desc: The excitement continues in part 2 with Bill and Randy catching more monster crappie on Bull Shoals.

programme.title: Fishing with Roland Martin
programme.desc: Roland skips Salt E Sink Worms under shady docks for largemouth bass with a musky bonus.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors
programme.desc: Jimmy is Fishing in Oklahoma catching crappie and bass.

programme.title: Ultimate Catch
programme.desc: Captain Eric and son Joey fish the Space Coast of Florida looking for that perfect Redfish!

programme.title: A Fishing Story with Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Bobby Bakewell is a Bassmaster Classic qualifier who honed his fishing skills through countless hours on the water with his father. He shares how his dad's guidance and passion for the sport shaped his journey and success as an angler.

programme.title: Salt Water Sportsman National Seminar Series
programme.desc: George Poveromo leads a discussion on deep dropping for ocean bottom fish.

programme.title: The Seahunter
programme.desc: Rob is alone and on a mission. HIs target? Sight fishing Shallow water sharks on fly.

programme.title: Modern Fishing with Jared Jeffries
programme.desc: Jared kicks off season three by introducing this year's cast of characters, and sets up all the fishing destinations and cuisine ahead of him this year.

programme.title: The Fish Guyz
programme.desc: The Guyz drift fish the wrecks and reefs of Key West with Captain Brandon Jimenez. George and Lain tour Key West in style in a hot pink Scoot Coupe and devour blackened yellowtail snapper at First Flight Restaurant and Brewery.

programme.title: Big Coast
programme.desc: Travel to world famous Duncanby Lodge for an early season trip with Captain Tim Milne and Kyle Morton.

programme.title: BigWater Adventures
programme.sub-title: Venice, LA Bull Redfish with the MGFC
programme.desc: Bull Redfish with the inshore arm of the Mexican Gulf Fishing Company of Venice, LA.

programme.title: Two Conchs Adventures
programme.sub-title: Cooking Our Catch at Key Largo Fisheries
programme.desc: The Two Conchs Crew starts things out by visiting Key Largo Fisheries, before heading out on the water and doing a ''Cook your catch.''

programme.desc: Bobby Bakewell is a Bassmaster Classic qualifier who honed his fishing skills through countless hours on the water with his father. He shares how his dad's guidance and passion for the sport shaped his journey and success as an angler.

programme.title: Lisa Roper Outdoors
programme.desc: Lisa explores one of Alberta's stocked gems and reels in a trout trifecta...brown, tiger, and her personal best rainbow on an unforgettable day at Lower Chain Lake.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher
programme.desc: Mark Melnyk is fishing the Yakima River in Washington with participants of Recovery Beyond and Red's Fly Shop.

programme.title: Connect Fishing Experiences
programme.desc: Reel Obsession Fishing Resort Esperanza Inlet offers a truly world class sport fishing experience in picturesque Zeballos on North.

programme.title: Extreme Angler
programme.desc: Catch and release season for smallmouth bass in Algoma Country on Wakomata Lake

programme.title: The Fish'n Canada Show
programme.sub-title: Buck Lake: New Trip, New Plan
programme.desc: Pete travels to Obakamiga Lake. He employs a sneaky strategy for the ultimate Walleye adventure and has maybe his best trip ever.

programme.title: Westcoast Sporting Journal
programme.desc: Big King Salmon Strategy Westview Marina.

programme.title: BC Outdoors Sport Fishing
programme.desc: Mike switches gears and heads to Osoyoos Lake for some early-season bass fishing action.

programme.title: Fishing the Wild West TV
programme.desc: Wes targets channel cats in the murky depths of Manitoba's Red River.

programme.title: Lisa Roper Outdoors
programme.desc: Lisa explores one of Alberta's stocked gems and reels in a trout trifecta...brown, tiger, and her personal best rainbow on an unforgettable day at Lower Chain Lake.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher
programme.desc: Mark Melnyk is fishing the Yakima River in Washington with participants of Recovery Beyond and Red's Fly Shop.

programme.title: Connect Fishing Experiences
programme.desc: Reel Obsession Fishing Resort Esperanza Inlet offers a truly world class sport fishing experience in picturesque Zeballos on North.

programme.title: Extreme Angler
programme.desc: Catch and release season for smallmouth bass in Algoma Country on Wakomata Lake
